description_long: This is an adult woman with a medium build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is dressed in a long-sleeved, V-neck sweater layered over a shirt, paired with fitted pants and slip-on shoes. Her hair is styled in a chin-length bob with a side part, framing her face. The clothing appears casual and suitable for everyday urban environments, with no visible accessories or carried items. The figure's facial features are stylized, and the overall appearance is clean and well-groomed. The shoes are simple and flat, designed for comfort and practicality.
description: A casually dressed adult woman in a T-pose, wearing a long-sleeved sweater, fitted pants, and slip-on shoes with a chin-length bob hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the V-neck sweater, facial features, and the full T-pose with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the layered clothing, and the side silhouette of the body and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sweater, pants, and the bob hairstyle, with arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, body contour, and the side of the shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeved sweater layered over a shirt with fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: chin-length bob with a side part
